note: Mathlib/NumberTheory/Cyclotomic/Basic.lean:655 - `def CyclotomicField : Type w := (cyclotomic n K).SplittingField`, the n-th cyclotomic field over K as splitting field of the n-th cyclotomic polynomial; IsCyclotomicExtension instance attached.

Mathlib/Analysis/Normed/Affine/Simplex.lean:83 - `def Equilateral (s : Simplex R P n) : Prop := ∃ r, ∀ i j, i ≠ j → dist (s.points i) (s.points j) = r`, stated for a general n-simplex; Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/AffineSpace/Simplex/Basic.lean:53 defines `abbrev Triangle := Simplex k P 2`, so an equilateral triangle is exactly `(t : Triangle k P).Equilateral` at n=2 - a special case of the general-n predicate.

Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/Walk/Chord.lean:45 - `def IsChordless (p : G.Walk u v) : Prop := ∀ e, ¬ p.IsChord e` (no edge of G joins two non-consecutive support vertices); Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/Connectivity/Subgraph.lean:370 proves `isInduced_toSubgraph : w.toSubgraph.IsInduced ↔ w.IsChordless`, tying chordlessness directly to induced-subgraph-hood. Stated for general walks, not restricted to `Path`s - an induced path is the conjunction with `Walk.IsPath`.
